meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Debug Faster
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to conquer debugging. A beginner-friendly resource for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to build better apps.
content.answer_block: Debugging is the primary barrier for student developers. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into an autonomous pair programmer. This setup allows you to analyze stack traces, identify architectural bottlenecks, and apply patches instantly, turning hours of frustrating trial-and-error into minutes of focused, high-impact development.
content.intro:
You are staring at a terminal overflowing with red text, your heart rate rising as the deadline approaches. You have rewritten the function three times, yet the bug remains, mocking your progress. This isn't a lack of talent; it is the classic 'student wall,' where the complexity of real-world systems outpaces traditional debugging methods.

But what if you had a senior engineer sitting beside you, ready to dissect your logic in real-time? By mastering Claude Code, you shift from a frustrated coder to a system architect. This guide bridges the gap between raw syntax and professional-grade debugging, using Antigravity to streamline your workflow and turn your codebase into a resilient, production-ready machine.

steps.title: Initialize the Workspace
steps.description: Establish a clean environment to ensure Claude Code has full visibility into your project dependencies and structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory structure and identify potential configuration issues that could prevent effective debugging.

steps.title: Configure Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Provide Claude with the necessary context to understand your specific framework and coding style.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of my current project architecture and identify the core modules for Claude's context.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with Traces
steps.description: Use Claude to ingest error logs and map them back to the exact line of code causing the failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Parse the recent error logs and correlate them with the specific function logic, highlighting the root cause.

steps.title: Iterative Patching
steps.description: Apply targeted fixes while maintaining the integrity of your existing code structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified bug that adheres to clean code principles and prevents future regressions.

steps.title: Verification and Testing
steps.description: Validate the fix by running unit tests directly through the Claude Code interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of edge-case tests to verify that the bug is fully resolved without breaking side effects.

pro_tips: Use Claude's '--no-interactive' flag for bulk file refactoring once you trust the model's output.
Always maintain a clean 'git' state before running Claude Code to ensure you can revert complex AI-generated changes.
Leverage the 'memory' feature in Claude Code to teach it your project's unique coding standards over time.
When debugging, feed the AI the 'package.json' or 'requirements.txt' first to ensure it understands your environment versions.
Use 'antigravity' to visualize the dependency graph before asking for a refactor to avoid breaking unintended connections.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin documenting your process in a 'Dev-Log' to prepare for technical interviews and portfolio presentations.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical arsenal to stop fighting your code and start mastering it. Every bug you squash is a lesson in system design, and every feature you finish is a milestone in your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
